filename: Families UX_UI - Features and Channels Prioritization.xlsx
summary: This Excel document outlines feature prioritization for the Families UX/UI, mapping capabilities like emotional signaling and usage tracking across communication channels such as WhatsApp and Email. It includes specific message templates for notifying caregivers about senior well-being and contains sample data tables tracking weekly usage minutes and emotional trends for a user named Sergio. The file details the logic for automated notifications based on AI-detected emotions and call duration.
